title: Novi asistent
summary: Novi asistent (Serbo-Croatian Cyrillic: Нови асистент, lit. 'New Assistant') is a 1964 Yugoslavian television series based on A. J. Cronin's stories about the fictional physician Dr. Finlay. The series was directed by Mirjana Samardžić and starred Dejan Dubajić, Ljiljana Jovanović, Nikola Simić, and Milan Srdoč.
